chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 2003 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.7951/2026 2. For orders on office objection Nos.1 to 3 3. For orders on CMA No.7952/2026 4. For hearing of main case 31.03.2026 Mr. Raj Ali Wahid, Advocate for the petitioner. ------------------------------------ 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through this petition, the petitioner, who is presently residing abroad, has sought transitory bail to enable him to surrender before the trial Court. Learned counsel for petitioner submits that petitioner is innocent and has been falsely implicated in FIR No.36/2021 under Sections 420, 468, 471, 467, 506 & 34 PPC registered at Police Station Artillery Maidan, Karachi. He further submits that the petitioner had no knowledge about the pendency of the above said case and upon knowing the same, the petitioner now wants to surrender himself before the learned trial Court to face the trial. Without touching the merits of the case, the petitioner is granted transitory bail to enable him to appear before the competent Court at Karachi within a period of fourteen days on his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/- (Rupees one lac only) and P.R. Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. This transitory bail shall remain in force for 14 days from today or the date on which the petitioner will surrender himself before the trial court, whichever is earlier.

Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. This transitory bail shall remain in force for 14 days from today or the date on which the petitioner will surrender himself before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
